results.title: Multi-AI-Agent Systems with crewAI
results.description: This project automates business workflows using autonomous AI agents organized into teams with specific roles and tools, leveraging the crewAI framework for efficient task execution.

results.title: CrewAI
results.description: CrewAI is a Python framework for building autonomous AI agent teams that collaborate to solve complex tasks, offering flexible tools and intelligent workflow orchestration.

results.title: CrewAI
results.description: CrewAI is a framework for orchestrating autonomous AI agents, enabling them to collaborate, perform complex tasks, and manage workflows using large language models.

results.title: CrewAI
results.description: CrewAI is a Python framework for orchestrating autonomous AI agents, offering a lean, fast, and flexible approach to building AI-powered applications with granular control and scalability.

results.title: CrewAI MultiAgent
results.description: This project demonstrates the use of CrewAI to create and manage multiple AI agents for collaborative task execution.

results.title: CrewAI Tools
results.description: CrewAI Tools provides customizable tools to empower CrewAI agents, enabling them to tackle sophisticated tasks with reliable, ready-to-use, or custom-built solutions.

results.title: CrewAI (llmstxt)
results.description: CrewAI is a framework for orchestrating autonomous AI agents to perform complex tasks collaboratively, offering features for agents, crews, tools, planning, and memory.

results.title: OpenAI Agents Python
results.description: The OpenAI Agents SDK is a framework for building multi-agent workflows, supporting various LLMs and featuring agents, handoffs, guardrails, sessions, and tracing.

results.title: CrewAI 股票分析系统
results.description: 基于 CrewAI 框架构建的智能股票分析系统，采用多 Agent 协作架构和智能流程控制，提供全面的股票投资分析服务，并利用 CrewAI 的团队和流程模式实现高效分析。

results.title: CrayonAI
results.description: CrayonAI is a lightweight UI toolkit for building AI agents, chatbots, and copilots. It provides React-based core libraries and a component library for creating engaging, responsive, and backend-agnostic LLM-powered applications.

results.title: Agent.ai
results.description: Agent.AI is a marketplace and professional network for AI agents, allowing users to discover, connect with, and hire AI agents, and for builders to create advanced AI agents using a no-code platform with data tools and access to frontier LLMs.

results.title: AI Agents Masterclass
results.description: A masterclass teaching developers how to leverage AI agents, which are LLMs with the ability to interact with the outside world, to transform businesses and create powerful software.

results.title: CrewAI Examples
results.description: A collection of examples demonstrating various ways to use the CrewAI framework for automating processes with role-playing AI agents.

results.title: Cloudflare Agents
results.description: The Cloudflare Agents SDK enables building and deploying AI-powered agents that autonomously perform tasks, communicate in real time, call AI models, persist state, schedule tasks, and run asynchronous workflows.

results.title: CrewAI (llmstxt)
results.description: The CrewAI Enterprise API allows programmatic interaction with deployed crews for integration into applications, workflows, and services, enabling execution initiation, progress monitoring, and result retrieval.

results.title: OpenAI Agents JS
results.description: The OpenAI Agents SDK for JavaScript and TypeScript allows developers to build and orchestrate AI agents, manage context, and integrate with various models and tools.

results.title: AI Agents for Trading
results.description: An open-source, experimental project featuring a collection of AI agents designed for various trading-related tasks, including a dual-mode AI trading system, strategy management, risk analysis, sentiment analysis, arbitrage, and more, with a focus on algo trading.

results.title: Arklex
results.description: Build, deploy, and scale intelligent AI agents with enterprise-grade reliability using a model-agnostic, agent-first design for multi-agent orchestration.

results.title: AnotherAI
results.description: AnotherAI is a platform that empowers AI agents, such as Claude Code, to build, evaluate, and manage other AI agents by providing an OpenAI-compatible API, a web interface for insights, and specialized tools for experimentation and debugging.

results.title: Slippi AI
results.description: Slippi-AI is a project that trains AI agents for Super Smash Bros. Melee using behavioral cloning on Slippi replays and then refines them with reinforcement learning.

results.title: AGENTS.md
results.description: AGENTS.md is a simple, open format for providing context and instructions to AI coding agents to help them work on projects.

results.title: CrewAI Enterprise API (llmstxt)
results.description: The CrewAI Enterprise API allows programmatic interaction with deployed crews for integration into applications, workflows, and services, enabling execution initiation, progress monitoring, and result retrieval.

results.title: Lucid Agents
results.description: A protocol-agnostic TypeScript framework for building, deploying, and monetizing autonomous AI agents with built-in payment infrastructure, on-chain identity, and agent-to-agent communication capabilities.

results.title: AI Agents
results.description: A provider-agnostic Ruby SDK for building multi-agent AI workflows with seamless handoffs, tool calling, and shared context.

results.title: AI Agents
results.description: AI Agents is a Ruby SDK for building sophisticated multi-agent AI workflows, enabling collaboration, tool integration, and seamless conversation handoffs.

results.title: Deep Agents UI
results.description: A user interface designed to work with LangChain's 'deep-agents' package, enabling users to interact with generic AI agents capable of handling various tasks.

results.title: SGR Agent Core
results.description: An open-source agentic framework for building intelligent research agents using Schema-Guided Reasoning with extensible tools, streaming responses, and OpenAI-compatible REST API.

results.title: Flows Feedback Loop
results.description: This project demonstrates how to set up a feedback loop for AI agent workflows using CrewAI, enabling self-evaluation and iterative improvement of generated content.

results.title: OpenAI Agents SDK TypeScript
results.description: The OpenAI Agents SDK for TypeScript is a lightweight and easy-to-use package designed for building agentic AI applications with minimal abstractions, offering features like agents, handoffs, guardrails, and built-in tracing.

results.title: Agents
results.description: A collection of 56 specialized AI subagents designed to extend Claude Code's capabilities, offering domain-specific expertise for enhanced development workflows.
